/CAL: TO SET PRELIM HEARING AND RECEIPT OF PRE-PLEA REPORT/TN: MIGUEL JUAREZALFARO/X:DEFERRED ENTERY OF JUDGMENT; DEFENDANT ENTERS A GUILTY PLEA:/X: AS A CONDITION OF THE DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT DEFENDANT TO REPORT TOSPR TO  CONFIRM IF THE DEFENDANT IS ENROLLED IN SCHOOL, SPR WILL MONITORED DEFENDANT'S PROGRESS IN SCHOOL, SPR WILL FORWARD PROGRESS REPORTS TO THE COURT, WHICH WILL MONITOR THE DEFENDANT FOR 1 YEAR, IF DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT DURING THE 1 YEAR SENTENCE WILL BE COURT PROBATION/X: HARVEY WAIVERENTERED AS TO RESTITUTION RELATED TO COURT NUMBERS 12019892 AND12020574,/SA1: ROXOLANA WACYK, MICHAEL BRIDGE AND BRAD MALLOUT/SA2:HAUS COFFEE SHOP AT3086 FOLSOM STREET IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CPSS/ARBUCKLE/REMA/PROG:03-11-13/TWS/CONTD: SENTENCE AND PROGRESSREPORT ON 03-11-13 IS DEPT 12/DAWF/X:IF REPORT FROM SPR IS POSITIVE,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL -ERP (D-12)/X:D-23 ERP 130 PM CASE HEARD IN D-28 BEFORE JUDGE CAROL YAGGY/X:WITH CLERK -ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/X:AND COURT REPORTER -BOB BALIAN CSR#5220/ /VD:11-20-12 TO SET DATE IN D-12/CTORD:ADULT PROBATION TO PREPARE A PRE-PLEA REPORT/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM HRG & RECEIPT OF PRE-PLEA REPORT IN D-12/DOP/
